## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Strapi and DataGrid content creation processes and best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strapi articles target developers; remove other audiences from briefs](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [DataGrid PSEOs don't need intros; use "Create a free DataGrid account" as CTA](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Internal linking issues persist for Nika; Timmy's setup works without manual input](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Both platforms require scannable content, avoiding large text blocks](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

## Topics

### Strapi Content Creation Process

  - [Target audience: front-end and back-end developers only](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Use regular article generation SOP from web to view outline](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [No need to touch code; Strapi provides internal code review](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Article length: \~2,500 words](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Add SEO tags and an image section (use LLM for image suggestions)](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Use direct headings (e.g., "What is..." instead of "Definition:")](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Aim for scannable content with short paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [CTA and intro should be brief; total article \~800 words or less](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [CTAs vary based on funnel stage (top, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### DataGrid Content Creation

  - [No specific templates for different article categories](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [CTAs tailored to funnel stage](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [For PSEOs:](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [No introduction needed](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [Meta title up to H1 (optional for PSEOs, necessary for editorials)](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [Always use "Create a free DataGrid account" as CTA](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Fill in metadata: slug, meta description, and meta title](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Configure field URL: copy "/blog/" and paste the slug](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Move completed PSEOs to "Approved for Publishing" status](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Internal Linking Issues

  - [Timmy's setup works without manual input](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Nika experiencing issues; will try Timmy's approach (no manual directions)](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Further testing needed to resolve discrepancies](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nika to deep dive into Strapi artifacts and review previous articles](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Both to keep in touch for any questions on respective platforms (Strapi/DataGrid)](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Nika to retest internal linking using Timmy's input method](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Continue creating content following discussed best practices for each platform](https://fathom.video/share/gqrkdRt8PhkDSPw_r1h4cc9beA8ZPqvc?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
